zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Drakelowe於1374年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾維爾比時，她的父親Thomas Drakelowe26歲，母親Ankeret de Salford19歲。她於大約1398年與WIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northampton在英國賀福爾理查茲 卡素結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她於1403年住在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾。她去世於1454年在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾維爾比享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Drakelowe于1374年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾維爾比时，她的父亲Thomas Drakelowe26岁，母亲Ankeret de Salford19岁。她于大约1398年与WIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northampton在英国賀福爾理查茲 卡素结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她于1403年住在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾。她去世于1454年在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾維爾比享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Drakelowe was born in 1374, in Wilby, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Drakelowe, was 26 and her mother, Ankeret de Salford, was 19. She married WIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northampton about 1398, in Richards Castle, Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She lived in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom in 1403. She died in 1454, in Wilby, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Drakelowe est née en 1374, à Wilby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Drakelowe, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Ankeret de Salford, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé WIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northampton environ 1398, à Richards Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle a vécu à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1403. Elle est décédée en 1454, à Wilby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 80 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Drakelowe è nata il nel 1374 nel Wilby, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Drakelowe, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Ankeret de Salford, aveva 19 anni. ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Drakeloweが1374年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアウィルビーで生まれた時，父Thomas Drakeloweは26歳，母Ankeret de Salfordは19歳であった。約1398年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアリチャーズ カストルでWIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northamptonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1403年にはイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアに住んでいた。彼女は1454年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアウィルビーで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Drakelowe(이)가 1374년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 윌비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Drakelowe(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ankeret de Salford(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1398년 영국 허퍼드실르 리처스 카스틀에서 WIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northampton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1403년도에 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 살았다. 그녀는 1454년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 윌비에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com WIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northampton aproximadamente 1398, em Richards Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Drakelowe родилась в 1374 г. в местности уилби, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Drakelowe было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Ankeret de Salford, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени WIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northampton около 1398 г. в местности ричардс кастл, хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она жила в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в 1403 году. Она умерла в 1454 г. в местности уилби, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 80 лет.

Se casó con WIlliam VAUX Esq of Bottisham and Northampton aproximadamente 1398, en Richards Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Vivió en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1403. Murió en 1454, en Wilby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 80 años.
